title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people at the dentist's. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A boy is having his teeth checked at a dentist's surgery. He is sitting in a special chair while the dentist is wearing gloves and looking at his teeth. There is a bright lamp and dental equipment nearby.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people playing frisbee. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Three friends are playing frisbee in a park on a sunny day. One young man is throwing the frisbee while two girls are waiting to catch it. There is a picnic table, grass and tall trees behind them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
